question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordFileDownloader.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: setStreamFileIndex()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a RecordFile with version exactly equal to ProtoRecordFileReader.VERSION - 1 to force setStreamFileIndex() to use the lastStreamFile-derived index, and by controlling the lastStreamFile state via the cutover mechanism, assign an index that causes the importer to accept a replayed transaction file as new, authorizing previously-rejected transactions without owner approval?
